title: Noise Resilience: Error Mitigation for Variational Algorithms
description: Master error mitigation techniques for running variational quantum algorithms on noisy hardware. Learn zero-noise extrapolation, probabilistic error cancellation, measurement error mitigation, and noise-aware optimization strategies.
learningObjectives: Classify quantum noise sources and their effects on VQE
Implement zero-noise extrapolation (ZNE) for error mitigation
Mitigate measurement readout errors using calibration matrices
Design noise-aware ansatze and optimization strategies
Evaluate the cost-benefit tradeoffs of error mitigation
